methodology.salaryRule: Bucketed salaries are visualized via numeric midpoints. Open-ended 400.000+ answers are treated as 425.000 for comparability.
methodology.fxRule: Cross-currency charts rely on editable reference FX rates and are explicitly modelling views, not exact compensation conversions.
methodology.locationRule: Turkey map views use domestic province-level answers. Abroad responses stay available separately at country level.
methodology.sampleRule: Many visuals suppress or mute tiny groups so that low-sample noise does not dominate the narrative.

queryIdeas.title: Yönetim patikası gerçekten ne kadar ödüyor?
queryIdeas.prompt: group role, seniority | filter currency=TRY | metric median(salary) | sort -median | min_count 20

queryIdeas.title: Şehir mi daha önemli, çalışma modeli mi?
queryIdeas.prompt: filter currency=TRY | group province, workMode | metric median(salary), count() | min_count 12

queryIdeas.title: Hangi sektörler büyüklükle birlikte daha iyi fiyatlıyor?
queryIdeas.prompt: filter currency=TRY | group companyType, companySize | metric median(salary) | min_count 15

queryIdeas.title: AI araçları kimlerde yoğunlaşıyor?
queryIdeas.prompt: group roleFamily, seniority | metric share(hasAiTools), count() | sort -share(hasAiTools) | min_count 20
